title: Missed filing income tax returns for years? How to use ITR-U to clear your backlog
summary: To help taxpayers catch up on missed filings or report previously unrecorded income, the government introduced the Updated ITR (ITR-U) framework.

title: Can missing 15 trading days over 27 years cost investors ₹1.9 crore? The data says yes
summary: FundsIndia analysis shows that missing just 15 trading days over 27 years would have cut a ₹2.84 crore corpus to ₹95 lakh. The data highlights how a handful of market sessions have driven a disproportionate share of long-term equity returns.

title: Tax-loss harvesting explained: Key things mutual fund investors should know before booking losses
summary: Tax-loss harvesting can help mutual fund investors offset capital gains and improve post-tax returns. However, experts say investors should stay focused on asset allocation, reinvestment and long-term wealth creation while using the strategy.

title: LTCG: How to save long-term capital gains tax — key exemptions and errors explained
summary: Sections 54, 54B, 54EC, and 54F represent the most effective pathways to claim these tax reliefs, tax experts say.

title: What financial decisions do people regret at 50? I asked ChatGPT; and, it was an eye-opener
summary: At 50, people often regret financial decisions that hinder their long-term freedom and relationships, according to ChatGPT.&nbsp;

title: Fund of Funds explained: Meaning, types, benefits and limitations you must know
summary: Fund of Funds (FoFs) are a type of mutual fund that does not invest directly in stocks, bonds, or other asset classes. Instead, they invest in other mutual fund schemes or just track an ETF or index fund.

title: ITR filing AY 2026-27: Know how to raise a rectification request to fix errors in your processed income tax return
summary: After you file the ITR, the Income Tax Department processes the return and issues an intimation under Section 143(1) of the Income Tax Act. If you notice an error in your processed ITR, you can submit a rectification request through the e-filing portal.

title: What changes in ITR-3 for F&O traders?
summary: The revised tax form mandates split reporting of derivatives turnover and profits, improving AIS-based data matching and raising compliance pressure on futures and options traders

title: 8th Pay Commission review: Consultations progress after 7 months as higher fitment factor demands grow
summary: A crucial phase begins as the 8th Pay Commission advances consultations and extends submissions, while fitment factor demands gain momentum ahead of recommendations that will affect lakhs of employees and pensioners.

title: Income-tax returns: Presumptive taxation scheme for businesses and freelancers explained — Top FAQs answered
summary: Income-Tax Returns: The presumptive taxation scheme simplifies I-T compliance for small businesses, professionals, and freelancers by allowing them to declare income as a fixed percentage of turnover without maintaining detailed books of accounts.

summary: Asset manager BlackRock sought to ​buy at ​least $5 billion worth of shares ​in the initial public offering of Elon Musk's SpaceX , the Wall Street Journal reported on ‌Thursday, ⁠citing people ⁠familiar with the matter.

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Friday
summary: Indian equities witnessed sharp swings before ending lower amid expiry-day volatility and rising geopolitical concerns. Profit booking in broader markets, weakness in IT stocks and cautious global sentiment overshadowed support from banking and pharma shares, keeping investors on edge.

title: Vedanta demerger: Four spin-off companies list on exchanges on June 15
summary: Vedanta’s four demerged businesses will begin trading on June 15, completing a major corporate restructuring. The listings will enable market-driven price discovery, help unlock shareholder value and allow each standalone company to pursue sector-specific growth opportunities independently.

title: Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley and others buy stake in Rs 1,960 crore Lenskart block deal
summary: ADIA-backed Platinum Jasmine A 2018 Trust sold a 2.3% stake in Lenskart through a Rs 1,960 crore block deal. The transaction attracted strong participation from mutual funds, insurers and foreign investors, reflecting continued confidence in the eyewear retailer’s growth prospects.

title: Block deal: Goldman Sachs picks stake in this smallcap stock that surged 50% in 6 months
summary: GNG Electronics witnessed a Rs 175 crore block deal as promoter Vidhi Khandelwal sold shares to domestic mutual funds and foreign investors. Institutional interest comes amid optimism over the company’s leadership in the refurbished electronics market and strong growth prospects.

title: US stocks: Oracle shares tumbles 12% as hefty AI spending, debt plans spook investors
summary: Oracle faced a sharp decline in stock prices on Thursday, triggering alarms among investors who are anxious about the company’s escalating debt and spending in the competitive AI infrastructure sector.
